projects.name: 4 Wayanad
projects.description: Designed and deployed a real-time disaster relief web platform to support flood and landslide-affected regions in Wayanad, July 2024.

projects.name: Digital Vehicle Assistant (DVA)
projects.description: Built an open-source smart web platform for fuel-efficient route planning and real-time vehicle management, featuring fuel station discovery, refueling history, maintenance reminders, and SOS alerts.

projects.name: Smart Vault
projects.description: Developed Smart Vault, a Python-based file encryption system using AES encryption and a USB device as a physical authentication key, packaged as a standalone .exe application for secure and user-friendly deployment.

work_history.title: Software Developer Intern
work_history.summary: Developed and maintained responsive, scalable front-end interfaces using Angular, integrated with SQL databases and middleware APIs to deliver production-grade web applications. Collaborated with agile, cross-functional teams to ensure UI consistency, code quality, and system reliability in a corporate environment. Took initiative in optimizing performance (35% improvement) and streamlining UI–middleware workflows, improving application efficiency and user experience across multiple platforms.

work_history.title: Web Lead
work_history.summary: Spearheaded the design and development of EETIF’s official website using React.js and Sanity CMS, boosting online engagement by 70% and reducing content update time by 50% through streamlined workflows and responsive UI design. Maintained and optimized the platform for 99% uptime, 100% content accuracy, and enhanced UI/UX accessibility, ensuring a seamless and inclusive experience across all devices.

work_history.title: Student Lead
work_history.summary: Led digital transformation at IEDC, developing a self-sustaining, tech-driven ecosystem by automating workflows and optimizing systems for a 40% efficiency boost. Directed 10+ innovation initiatives, increasing student engagement by 60% and tripling startup participation. Mentored 250+ students in web development, productivity tools, and technical leadership. Guided junior teams to independently execute flagship events like exodia, strengthening campus tech culture and innovation.

work_history.title: Notion Campus Leader
work_history.summary: Built a growing community of Notion users on campus, conducting hands-on workshops and peer sessions to help students streamline their academic and personal productivity. Collaborated with Notion’s global team to bring exclusive resources and opportunities to students, while tailoring content and events to local needs and student workflows.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
